overview.short: Sundarnath is a temple in Kursakanta Araria of the Indian state of Bihar near the India–Nepal border, at Sundari Math (Sundarnath Dham) where Hindus from South Nepal and North Biha
overview.description: Sundarnath is a temple in Kursakanta Araria of the Indian state of Bihar near the India–Nepal border, at Sundari Math (Sundarnath Dham) where Hindus from South Nepal and North Bihar worship the Hindu god Shiva. It is a major historical temple to Shiva in the Mithila region of Bihar.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Jahada Rural Municipality
topPlaces.description: Jahada (Nepali: जहदा गाउँपालिका) is a rural municipality (gaunpalika) out of eight rural municipality located in Laxminiya Bazzar Morang District of Koshi Province of Nepal. There are a total of 17 municipalities in Morang in which 9 are urban and 8 are rural.

topPlaces.name: Majhare
topPlaces.description: Majhare is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 1356.

topPlaces.name: Laxminiya Bazzar
topPlaces.description: Laxminiya Bazzar (Nepali: जहदा गाउँपालिका) is a village (gaunpalika), one of eight rural municipalities located in the Laxminiya Bazzar Morang District of Province No. 1 of Nepal.

topPlaces.name: Necha
topPlaces.description: Nocha is a village development committee in Morang District in Province No. 1 of North-eastern Nepal.

topPlaces.name: Pokhariya, Morang
topPlaces.description: Pokhariya is a village development committee within the Morang District, Koshi Zone, Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 2078 people living in 376 individual households.

topPlaces.name: Amaibariyati
topPlaces.description: Amaibariyati is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 5473 people living in 1133 individual households.

topPlaces.name: Matigachha
topPlaces.description: Bhathigachh is a village development committee in Morang District in the Koshi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 11276.

topPlaces.name: Sorabhaj
topPlaces.description: Sorabhag is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 7865 people living in 1605 individual households.

Majhare is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 1356.

Pokhariya is a village development committee within the Morang District, Koshi Zone, Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 2078 people living in 376 individual households.

Amaibariyati is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 5473 people living in 1133 individual households.
Bhathigachh is a village development committee in Morang District in the Koshi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 11276.

Sorabhag is a village development committee in Morang District in the Kosi Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 7865 people living in 1605 individual households.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sundernath?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sundernath is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

The nearest airport is Bagdogra Airport (Siliguri/Darjeeling) (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Katihar Junction (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sundernath?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sundernath at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sundernath?
faq.a: Stays in Sundernath start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sundernath?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jahada Rural Municipality, Majhare, Laxminiya Bazzar, Necha, Pokhariya, Morang.
